chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: 3622 - وَ قَالَ اَلْعَالِمُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "ضَمِنْتُ لِمَنِ اِقْتَصَدَ أَنْ لاَ يَفْتَقِرَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3622 - The Scholar, Imam (as) said: "I guarantee that whoever practices moderation will never become poor."
